---
title: "Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
format: 
  revealjs:
    fig-format: svg
    embed-resources: true
    include-after-body: styles/clean_title_page.html
    theme: [default, styles/tcdsb_revealjs.scss]
    css: styles/tcdsb_extras.css
    footer: ""
    logo: assets/r_a_logo.png
    transition: fade #slide 
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: ""
    title-slide-attributes: 
      data-background-image: assets/title_slide_background.png
dev: ragg_png
params:
  param1: "Parameter 1"
---



## Slide 1 

Here is the first slide

-   Bullet 1\
-   Bullet 2\
-   Bullet 3\
-   Bullet 4\
-   Bullet 5\

## Slide 2
### Multiple Columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
Here is some text to describe the chart on the right
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

```{r fig.height=8}
mtcars |> 
  dplyr::group_by(cyl) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(hp = mean(hp)) |> 
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = factor(cyl), y = hp)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(fill = "#560F11") + 
  ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(label = round(hp,1)),
                     vjust = -1, 
                     size = 8) + 
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 250)) + 
  ggplot2::labs(x = "Cylinders", y = "Horsepower") + 
  tcdsb::tcdsb_ggplot_theme(text_scale = 1.5)
```

:::

::::

## Slide 3
### Inserting Images

::: {.no-stretch} 
<!--  Need 'no-stetch' div or else image will fill the entire slide -->
![](assets/r_a_logo.png){width=350px fig-align="center"}
:::
